'''Tyrimm Wyln''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] farmer.

==Biography==
Along with her sisters, Tyrimm Wyln managed a farm. Wyln met Togorian master smith [[Mlatar Thon Gra]] and began a romantic relationship with him. Tyrimm embarked on a tour, visiting worlds such as [[Ord Klina]] and [[Zuliria]]. On Zuliria, Tyrimm was killed in the crossfire of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack on a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell. Eventually, Mlatar left Togoria to search for Wyln. He was devastated to find, with the help of new friend [[Ther-das]], Tyrimm Wyln's fate.<ref name="AIR" />
